generated_comment:
Deepak: Arre yaar, aajkal bachche log har doosre sentence mein woh maa-behen wali gaali bol dete hain, uska matlab thodi na literally lete hain. Bas expression hai, gusse mein nikal gaya toh nikal gaya.
Son: But Papa, that language is problematic.
Deepak: Problematic-vroblematic kuch nahi, itna sensitive mat bano. Aur ladka hoke itni naram baat karega toh log bhi wahi bolenge na, thoda mard bano.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it normalizes female-family-body-based abuse as harmless 'expression' and dismisses criticism with 'itna sensitive mat bano.' It also encodes feminizing a man as an insult through 'ladka hoke' and 'thoda mard bano.'
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 52. A Marwari businessman in Jaipur who runs a 200 crore family business. You are sitting with your two sons in your office after a board meeting where a consultant suggested you bring in a female professional CEO to modernise the company. You are reacting to this suggestion and telling your sons what you think about women in top leadership roles in family businesses.
